items.title: Gelof leads Israel past Netherlands in 6-2 victory to end WBC on a high note
items.summary_ja: 2026 WBC最終戦でイスラエルがオランダに6-2で勝利。三塁手Jake Gelofが6回満塁で左翼前に適時打を放ち試合を決め、チームは2勝2敗で大会を締め括った
items.summary_en: Third baseman Jake Gelof was the hero for Team Israel (2-2) in its final 2026 World Baseball Classic contest, a 6-2 win over the Netherlands (1-3). With bases loaded and two outs in the sixth, Gelof's grounder through the left-infield gap gave Israel a 4-2 lead and sealed the victory.

items.title: Baseball Will Tell You Where It Needs To Grow
items.summary_ja: WBCを機に各国代表が競技普及を訴えた。Italyは国内に野球が根付いておらず、代表はアメリカ出身選手に依存する現状。Royals一塁手Vinnie Pasquantinoらが普及への思いを語った
items.summary_en: During the World Baseball Classic, players and coaches expressed their desire to grow baseball globally. Italy's national team, which leans heavily on American-heritage players like Royals first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino, highlights how pockets of the sport still need catalysts to expand in countries where baseball exists only marginally.

items.title: Takeaways from Italy’s 8-6 World Baseball Classic Quarterfinal Victory over Puerto Rico
items.summary_ja: ItalyがWBC準々決勝でPuerto Ricoを8-6で破りセミファイナル進出。主将Vinnie Pasquantinoは祖国イタリアでも試合が放送され新聞一面を飾ったと喜び、WBCの意義を語った
items.summary_en: Italy upset Puerto Rico 8-6 in the WBC quarterfinals, advancing to the semifinals in a Cinderella run. Captain Vinnie Pasquantino emphasized that having the game televised back in Italy and featured on front pages demonstrated exactly why the World Baseball Classic matters for growing the sport internationally.
items.title_ja: Italy、WBC準々決勝でPuerto Ricoに8-6勝利

items.summary_en: Team USA defeated rival Canada 5-3 in the WBC quarterfinals behind clutch relief pitching. Aaron Judge, dubbed Captain America, doubled in the first to energize the Houston crowd, though the offense lacked its pool-play explosiveness. USA took an early 3-0 lead and held on to advance to the semifinals.
items.title_ja: USA、WBC準々決勝でCanadaに5-3勝利
